packages.name: @domphy/app
packages.description: Domphy App - a port of the Next.js App Router feature set for Domphy: routing, nested layouts, navigation, data loading, metadata, middleware, SSR and API routes

packages.name: @domphy/chart
packages.description: ECharts-grade chart library for Domphy. SVG-native, tone/density cascade.

packages.name: @domphy/core
packages.description: Domphy Core UI Framework

packages.name: create-domphy
packages.description: Scaffold a runnable Domphy starter project (npm create domphy@latest)

packages.name: @domphy/dnd
packages.description: Domphy Drag & Drop - reactive adapter for the framework-agnostic @formkit/drag-and-drop engine

packages.name: @domphy/doctor
packages.description: Domphy Doctor - static analyzer that flags non-idiomatic Domphy element trees (AI self-correction)

packages.name: @domphy/floating
packages.description: Domphy Floating - anchor positioning (tooltips, popovers, dropdowns), a 1-1 vendor of floating-ui (dom + core + utils), zero dependencies

packages.name: @domphy/form
packages.description: Domphy Form - headless form state, validation and submission, a 1-1 port of @tanstack/form-core

packages.name: @domphy/i18n
packages.description: Domphy i18n â€” generic i18next wrapper with reactive Domphy integration (globalThis dedup, typed keys, t(listener, key) overload)

packages.name: @domphy/markdown
packages.description: Domphy Markdown - parse Markdown (remark/MDAST) into Domphy element trees for SSR with @domphy/core

packages.name: @domphy/mcp
packages.description: Domphy MCP server - exposes patches, packages, rules, and the doctor to MCP-capable AI agents

packages.name: @domphy/mermaid
packages.description: Domphy Mermaid - build-time (SSG) and client-side Mermaid diagram rendering, with markdown tree integration for @domphy/markdown

packages.name: @domphy/palette
packages.description: Domphy Palette - color-science toolkit: measure and validate palette quality with CIELAB metrics, a port of chromametry

packages.name: @domphy/press
packages.description: Domphy Press — VitePress-baseline static doc site framework built on @domphy/app + @domphy/markdown

packages.name: @domphy/query
packages.description: Domphy Query - async state management, a 1-1 port of @tanstack/query-core

packages.name: @domphy/router
packages.description: Domphy Router - type-safe routing, a 1-1 port of @tanstack/router-core

packages.name: @domphy/table
packages.description: Domphy Table - headless table logic, a 1-1 port of @tanstack/table-core

packages.name: @domphy/theme
packages.description: Domphy Design System

packages.name: @domphy/ui
packages.description: Domphy UI

packages.name: @domphy/virtual
packages.description: Domphy Virtual - headless list/grid virtualization, a 1-1 port of @tanstack/virtual-core

patches.name: abbreviation

props.name: color
props.doc: Base text/decoration color tone. Optional `ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`, default "neutral".

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Hover color tone. Optional `ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`, default "primary".

patches.doc: Styles an abbreviation/acronym with a dotted underline and a "help" cursor, shifting to the accent color on hover. Apply to an `<abbr>` element.

patches.name: accordion
patches.signature: accordion(props: { type?: "single" | "multiple"; color?: ValueOrState<ThemeColor>; accentColor?: ValueOrState<ThemeColor>; } = {})

props.name: type
props.doc: `"single"` (default) or `"multiple"`. Single mode auto-closes siblings.

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone for borders and backgrounds. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Accent color for focus outlines on summary. Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: Container patch that groups `<details>` elements into a bordered accordion. In `type: "single"` mode (default), opening one item closes all siblings.
patches.example: { div: [ { details: [{ summary: "Section A" }, { p: "Content A" }], $: [details()] }, { details: [{ summary: "Section B" }, { p: "Content B" }], $: [details()] }, ], $: [accordion()] }

patches.name: alert

props.name: color
props.doc: Surface/accent color tone. Optional `ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`, default "primary".

patches.doc: A semantic alert surface block with a colored inset bar, padding, and `role="alert"`. Typically applied to a `<div>` (any block container).

patches.name: avatar

props.name: color
props.doc: Background/foreground color tone. Optional `ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`, default "primary".

patches.doc: A circular avatar container that centers initials/text and cover-fits any child ``. Typically applied to an inline-flex container such as a ``.

patches.name: badge
patches.signature: badge(props: { color?: ValueOrState<ThemeColor>; label?: ValueOrState<string | number>; } = {})

props.name: color
props.doc: Badge color tone. Optional `ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`, default "danger".

props.name: label
props.doc: Text/number shown in the badge. Optional `ValueOrState<string | number>`, default 999.

patches.doc: Renders a small count/label bubble pinned to the top-right corner of its host (via a `::after` pseudo-element). Typically applied to an inline container such as a `<span>` wrapping an icon or element.

patches.name: blockquote

props.name: color
props.doc: Surface/bar color tone. Optional `ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`, default "neutral".

patches.doc: Styles a quotation block with a colored inset side bar, padded surface, and shifted tone. Apply to a `<blockquote>` element.
patches.example: { blockquote: "Design is how it works.", $: [blockquote({ color: "primary" })] }

patches.name: breadcrumb

props.name: color
props.doc: Color tone for links/separators. Optional `ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`, default "neutral".

props.name: separator
props.doc: String inserted between items via `::after`. Optional `string`, default "/".

patches.doc: A horizontal breadcrumb navigation that lays out its children with a separator between items and highlights the `[aria-current=page]` item. Apply to a `<nav>` element.

patches.name: breadcrumbEllipsis

props.name: color
props.doc: Color tone for the trigger. Optional `ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`, default "neutral".

patches.doc: An ellipsis trigger button for collapsed breadcrumb items, with hover and focus-visible states. Apply to a `<button>` element.

patches.name: button

props.name: color
props.doc: Button color tone. Optional `ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`, default "primary".

patches.doc: A themed button control with density-aware padding/radius and hover, focus-visible, `[disabled]`, and `[aria-busy=true]` states. Apply to a `<button>` element.

patches.name: buttonGhost

props.name: color
props.doc: Text color tone. Optional `ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`, defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: A transparent button with no border or background — suitable for icon actions, inline controls, and delete/close triggers. Apply to a `<button>` element.

patches.name: buttonSwitch
patches.signature: buttonSwitch(props: { checked?: ValueOrState<boolean>; accentColor?: ValueOrState<ThemeColor>; color?: ValueOrState<ThemeColor>; } = {})

props.name: checked
props.doc: Toggle state. Optional `ValueOrState<boolean>`, default false.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Color tone when checked (on). Optional `ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`, default "primary".

props.name: color
props.doc: Color tone when unchecked (off track). Optional `ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`, default "neutral".

patches.doc: A pill-shaped toggle switch with `role="switch"`; clicking flips the bound `checked` state and slides the thumb. Apply to a `<button>` element.

patches.name: card

props.name: color
props.doc: Surface/border color tone. Optional `ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`, default "neutral".

patches.doc:
A grid-based card surface that auto-places known child elements into named regions: `` (image), headings (title), `

` (description), `

` (aside), `
` (content), and `
` (footer). Typically applied to a `
` (any block container).

patches.name: code

props.name: color
props.doc: Surface/text color tone. Optional `ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`, default "neutral".

patches.doc: Styles an inline code snippet with a subtle surface background, rounded corners, and shifted tone. Apply to a `<code>` element.

patches.name: combobox
patches.signature: combobox(props: { multiple?: boolean; value?: ValueOrState< | Array<number | string | null | undefined> | number | string | null | undefined >; options?: Array<{ label: string; value: string }>; placement?: ValueOrState<Placement>; content: DomphyElement; color?: ThemeColor; open?: ValueOrState<boolean>; input?: DomphyElement; })

props.name: multiple
props.doc: Allow selecting multiple values (popover stays open on click). Optional `boolean`, default false.

props.name: value
props.type: ValueOrState< | Array<number | string | null | undefined> | number | string | null | undefined >
props.doc: Selected value(s). Optional `ValueOrState<Array<number | string | null | undefined> | number | string | null | undefined>`, no default.

props.name: options
props.doc: Available `{ label, value }` options used to render selected tags. Optional `Array<{ label: string; value: string }>`, default `[]`.

props.name: placement
props.doc: Floating popover placement. Optional `ValueOrState<Placement>`, default "bottom".

props.name: content
props.doc: The floating popover content element. Required `DomphyElement`.

props.name: color
props.doc: Color tone for the control. Optional `ThemeColor`, default "neutral".

props.name: open
props.doc: Whether the popover is open. Optional `ValueOrState<boolean>`, default false.

props.name: input
props.doc: Custom input element; when omitted a default `<input>` is created. Optional `DomphyElement`.

patches.doc: A combobox/multi-select control: renders selected options as removable tags plus an input, and shows a floating popover (`content`) anchored to the host. Apply to a `<div>` element.
patches.example: { div: null, $: [combobox({ options: [{ label: "A", value: "a" }], content: { div: null } })] }

patches.name: command
patches.doc: Command-palette container patch. Sets up a vertical flex column and provides a shared `command` context (a query State) consumed by `commandSearch` and `commandItem` descendants to filter the list. Typically applied to a `<div>`.

patches.name: commandItem

props.name: color
props.doc: Base theme color tone. Defaults to "neutral".

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Accent color used for the focus outline. Defaults to "primary".

patches.doc: Selectable item (`role="option"`) in a command palette. On mount, immediately hides itself if the current query doesn't match its text content, and subscribes to future query changes — so items added dynamically after a search is typed are correctly filtered. Typically applied to a `<button>` (or any clickable element) used inside a `command()`.

patches.name: commandSearch

props.name: color
props.doc: Base theme color tone. Defaults to "neutral".

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Accent color used for the focus border. Defaults to "primary".

patches.doc: Search input for a command palette. Wires the input's value into the parent `command` context's query State so descendant `commandItem`s filter live. Apply to an `<input>` element used inside a `command()`.

patches.name: datePicker

props.name: value
props.doc: Controlled value (`ValueOrState<DatePickerValue>`): a `Date`/`null` in single mode, a `[start, end]` tuple in range mode.

props.name: mode
props.doc: Selection mode, "single" | "range". Defaults to "single".

props.name: time
props.doc: When true, also pick hour + minute (applied to the selected date(s)). Defaults to false.

props.name: min
props.doc: Earliest selectable day (inclusive), a `Date`.

props.name: max
props.doc: Latest selectable day (inclusive), a `Date`.

props.name: disabledDate
props.doc: Predicate `(date: Date) => boolean` to disable arbitrary days.

props.name: locale
props.doc: BCP-47 locale for names/first-day-of-week/formatting. Defaults to `navigator.language` (or "en-US" in non-browser).

props.name: weekStartsOn
props.doc: Override first day of week (0 = Sunday … 6 = Saturday). Defaults to the locale's first day.

props.name: format
props.doc: Override the input display string, `(value: DatePickerValue) => string`.

props.name: onChange
props.doc: Called with the new value whenever the selection changes, `(value: DatePickerValue) => void`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Accent color (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`) for selected/active days. Defaults to "primary".

props.name: placement
props.doc: Popover placement (`ValueOrState<Placement>`) relative to the input. Defaults to "bottom-start".

patches.doc: A native, themeable date picker patch for an `<input>`. Opens a calendar popover (rendered with Domphy elements, positioned via `@domphy/floating`) supporting single/range selection, optional time, min/max + disabled days, localized names, and keyboard navigation. The input is read-only and shows the formatted selection; compose with `inputText()` for the input's look.

patches.name: descriptionList

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`) for the term/description text. Defaults to "neutral".

patches.doc: Styles a description list as a two-column grid (terms in the first column, descriptions in the second), theming the nested `<dt>`/`<dd>` elements. Apply to a `<dl>` element.

patches.name: details
patches.signature: details(props: { color?: ValueOrState<ThemeColor>; accentColor?: ValueOrState<ThemeColor>; duration?: number; } = {})

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`) for the body/summary. Defaults to "neutral".

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Accent color (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`) for the summary's focus outline. Defaults to "primary".

props.name: duration
props.doc: Open/close transition duration in milliseconds. Defaults to 240.

patches.doc: Styles a native disclosure widget: a themed `<summary>` header with an animated rotating chevron and an expand/collapse transition on the body content. Apply to a `<details>` element.

patches.name: dialog

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone for the dialog surface. Defaults to "neutral".

props.name: open
props.doc: Open state (`ValueOrState<boolean>`); set it to true/false to show/hide. Defaults to false.

patches.doc: Modal dialog patch driven by an `open` State. Calls `showModal()`/`close()`, fades via opacity, locks page scroll while open, traps Tab focus within the dialog, restores focus to the previously focused element on close, sets `aria-modal`, and closes on outside (backdrop) click. Apply to a `<dialog>`.

patches.name: divider

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`) for the label text and rules. Defaults to "neutral".

patches.doc: A horizontal separator (`role="separator"`) with a line on each side of its content, suitable for labelled dividers ("or"). Apply to a `<div>` element.

patches.name: drawer
patches.signature: drawer(props: { color?: ThemeColor; open?: ValueOrState<boolean>; placement?: Placement; size?: string; } = {})

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone for the drawer surface. Defaults to "neutral".

props.name: open
props.doc: Open state (`ValueOrState<boolean>`); set true/false to show/hide. Defaults to false.

props.name: placement
props.doc: Edge to anchor to. "left" | "right" | "top" | "bottom" | "start" | "end". Defaults to "end".

props.name: size
props.doc: CSS length for the drawer's width (left/right/start/end) or height (top/bottom). Defaults to themeSpacing(80) for left/right, themeSpacing(64) for top/bottom.

patches.doc: Edge-anchored modal drawer driven by an `open` State. Slides in/out from a chosen edge via a 250 ms transform transition, calls `showModal()`/`close()`, locks page scroll while open, and closes on backdrop click. A 350 ms fallback ensures `close()` is always called even when `transitionend` doesn't fire (reduced-motion, `display:none`, detached element). Apply to a `<dialog>`. Because the patch uses the native `<dialog>` `showModal()` API, the browser traps focus inside the drawer while it is open and restores focus to the previously focused element when `close()` is called. Sets `aria-modal="true"`. Escape key closes the drawer via the animated state path (not immediate close). `"start"` and `"end"` placements resolve to left/right based on the document's `dir` attribute at mount time, enabling RTL-aware drawers: `"start"` → left (LTR) / right (RTL); `"end"` → right (LTR) / left (RTL).

patches.name: emphasis

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`) for the text. Defaults to "neutral".

patches.doc: Italic emphasized inline text. Apply to an `<em>` element.

patches.name: empty

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone for the muted text/icon. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: Styles a container as an empty-state placeholder: centered flex column with muted coloring and comfortable padding. Provide the icon, title, and description as child elements.
patches.example: { div: [ { span: "📭" }, { p: "No items yet", $: [paragraph()] }, { span: "Add your first item to get started", $: [small()] }, ], $: [empty()] }

patches.name: errorBoundary
patches.signature: errorBoundary(props: { fallback?: | DomphyElement | ((error: unknown, reset: () => void) => DomphyElement); onError?: (error: unknown) => void; } = {})

props.name: fallback
props.doc: Fallback element or factory `(error, reset) => element`. Defaults to a plain error message div.

props.name: onError
props.doc: Optional callback for logging/telemetry.

patches.doc: Catches errors thrown inside reactive child expressions and renders a fallback element instead of crashing the whole tree. Apply to any container. Only errors in *reactive* children (functions returning element arrays) are caught. Errors during static construction propagate normally — those are programming errors, not runtime data errors.
patches.example: { div: (l) => renderUserContent(l), $: [errorBoundary({ fallback: { p: "Something went wrong." } })] }

patches.name: fab

props.name: color
props.doc: Button color tone. Optional `ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`, defaults to `"primary"`.

props.name: size
props.doc: Button size preset. Optional `"small" | "medium" | "large"`, defaults to `"medium"`.

patches.doc: Floating Action Button — a circular elevated button typically used for the primary action on a screen. Apply to a `<button>` element.

patches.name: figure

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`) for the figure/caption text. Defaults to "neutral".

patches.doc: Lays out a figure as a column with block-level media (img/svg/video/canvas) and a themed `<figcaption>`. Apply to a `<figure>` element.

patches.name: formGroup

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`) for legend/text/surface. Defaults to "neutral".

props.name: layout
props.doc: Field arrangement, "horizontal" (label beside control) | "vertical" (label above). Defaults to "horizontal".

patches.doc: Layout patch for a group of form fields. Arranges a ``, `

patches.name: heading

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`) for the heading text. Defaults to "neutral".

patches.doc: Styles a heading, scaling its font size by level (h1 largest … h6 smallest) relative to the theme base size. Apply to a heading element `<h1>`–`<h6>`.

patches.name: horizontalRule

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`) for the rule. Defaults to "neutral".

patches.doc: A thematic break rendered as a thin 1px themed line with vertical margin. Apply to an `<hr>` element.

patches.name: icon

props.name: color
props.doc: Optional theme color tone for the icon (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: Styles an inline icon container: square box that centers its content and applies the themed icon color. Apply to a `<span>` element.

patches.name: image

props.name: color
props.doc: Optional theme color tone for the placeholder background (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: Styles a responsive image: full-width, cover-fit, rounded corners with a themed placeholder background. Apply to an `` element.

patches.name: inputCheckbox

props.name: color
props.doc: Optional theme color tone for the box/border (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Optional theme color tone for the checked/indeterminate fill and focus ring (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: Styles a custom checkbox with themed box, check mark, indeterminate state, hover, focus and disabled styling. Apply to an `<input>` element of type `checkbox` (the patch sets `type: "checkbox"`).

patches.name: inputColor

props.name: color
props.doc: Optional theme color tone used for the disabled state (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Optional theme color tone (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: Styles a native color picker swatch with themed padding, rounded swatch and disabled styling. Apply to an `<input>` element of type `color` (the patch sets `type: "color"`).

patches.name: inputDateTime
patches.signature: inputDateTime(props: { mode?: InputDateTimeMode; color?: ValueOrState<ThemeColor>; accentColor?: ValueOrState<ThemeColor>; } = {})

props.name: mode
props.doc: Input mode selecting the host `type`: `"date" | "time" | "week" | "month" | "datetime-local"`. Defaults to `"datetime-local"`.

props.name: color
props.doc: Optional theme color tone for text/border (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Optional theme color tone for the hover/focus ring (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: Styles a native date/time input with themed border, padding, hover, focus, invalid and disabled states. The `mode` selects the input `type`. Apply to an `<input>` element (the patch sets `type` to the chosen `mode`).

patches.name: inputFile

props.name: color
props.doc: Optional theme color tone for text/border and the upload button (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Optional theme color tone for the hover/focus ring (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: Styles a native file input with a themed upload button, border, hover, focus and disabled states. Apply to an `<input>` element of type `file` (the patch sets `type: "file"`).

patches.name: inputNumber

props.name: color
props.doc: Optional theme color tone for text/border (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Optional theme color tone for the hover/focus ring (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: Styles a native number input with themed border, padding, visible spin buttons, hover, focus and disabled states. Apply to an `<input>` element of type `number` (the patch sets `type: "number"`).

patches.name: inputOTP
patches.doc: Lays out a one-time-password container as a horizontal row of inputs and wires keyboard navigation: auto-advance on input, backspace/arrow movement, and paste distribution across the child inputs. Apply to a container element (e.g. `<div>`) whose direct children are the OTP `<input>` boxes. Takes no props.
patches.example: { div: null, $: [inputOTP()], children: [{ input: null }, { input: null }] }

patches.name: inputPassword

props.name: color
props.doc: Base color tone for border/background/text. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Accent outline color on focus-within. Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: Password input wrapper: a styled `<div>` that inserts an `<input type="password">` and a show/hide toggle button. The outer div carries the focus-ring outline via `:focus-within`. Apply to an empty `<div>`.

patches.name: inputRadio

props.name: color
props.doc: Optional theme color tone for the box/border (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Optional theme color tone for the checked dot and focus ring (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: Styles a custom radio button with a themed circular box, checked dot, hover, focus and disabled states. Apply to an `<input>` element of type `radio` (the patch sets `type: "radio"`).

patches.name: inputRange

props.name: color
props.doc: Optional theme color tone for the slider track (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Optional theme color tone for the thumb and focus ring (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: Styles a range slider with a themed track and thumb, hover, focus and disabled states. Apply to an `<input>` element of type `range` (the patch sets `type: "range"`).

patches.name: inputSearch

props.name: color
props.doc: Optional theme color tone for text/border/placeholder (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Optional theme color tone for the hover/focus ring (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: Styles a search input with themed border, padding, placeholder color, native search decorations, hover, focus and disabled states. Apply to an `<input>` element of type `search` (the patch sets `type: "search"`).

patches.name: inputSwitch

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Optional theme color tone for the checked track (`ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`). Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: Styles a checkbox as a toggle switch: themed track and sliding knob that animates and recolors on checked, plus a disabled state. Apply to an `<input>` element of type `checkbox` (the patch sets `type: "checkbox"`).

patches.name: inputText

props.name: color
props.doc: Base color tone for text/border/background. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Accent color tone for the hover/focus outline. Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: Themed single-line text input primitive. Sets `type="text"` and styles the field with themed border, focus ring, placeholder, disabled and validation (`data-status`) states. Apply to an `<input>` element.

patches.name: keyboard

props.name: color
props.doc: Color tone for text/background/border. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: Renders keyboard-key styling (themed background, border and padding) for a keystroke hint. Apply to a `<kbd>` element.

patches.name: label

props.name: color
props.doc: Base color tone for the label text. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Accent color tone applied on focus-within. Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: Themed form-label primitive: inline-flex layout with gap, themed text color, focus-within highlighting and a disabled (`aria-disabled`) state. Apply to a `<label>` element.

patches.name: link

props.name: color
props.doc: Base color tone for the link text. Defaults to `"primary"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Accent color tone for visited/focus states. Defaults to `"secondary"`.

patches.doc: Themed hyperlink primitive: styles text color, hover underline, visited, focus ring and a disabled state. Apply to an `<a>` element.

patches.name: linkButton

props.name: color
props.doc: Button color tone. Optional `ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`, default "primary".

patches.doc: An `<a>` element styled to look like a button — same visual appearance as `button()` but preserves link semantics (href, middle-click, right-click). Apply to an `<a>` element.

patches.name: list

props.name: color
props.doc: Surface color tone. Optional `ThemeColor`, defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: Styles a navigation/display list container. Sets `list-style: none` and zero padding; pairs with `listItem` and `listItemButton`. Apply to `<ul>`.

patches.name: listItem

props.name: dense
props.doc: Reduce vertical padding. Optional `boolean`, defaults to `false`.

patches.doc: A non-interactive list row. Typically wraps an icon + text. Apply to `<li>`.

patches.name: listItemButton
patches.signature: listItemButton(props: { color?: ValueOrState<ThemeColor>; accentColor?: ThemeColor; dense?: boolean; } = {})

props.name: color
props.doc: Color tone. Optional `ValueOrState<ThemeColor>`, defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Focus/active accent. Optional `ThemeColor`, defaults to `"primary"`.

props.name: dense
props.doc: Reduce vertical padding. Optional `boolean`, defaults to `false`.

patches.doc: An interactive (clickable) list row with hover/focus-visible states. Apply to `<button>` or `<a>` inside an `<li>`.

patches.name: mark

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Accent color tone for the highlight fill and text. Defaults to `"highlight"`.

patches.doc: Themed highlight primitive: gives marked/highlighted inline text a tinted background, rounded corners and padding. Apply to a `<mark>` element.

patches.name: menu
patches.signature: menu(props: { items: MenuItem[]; activeKey?: ValueOrState<number | string | null>; selectable?: boolean; color?: ThemeColor; accentColor?: ThemeColor; } = { items: [] })

props.name: items
props.doc: Item definitions `{ label, key?, onClick? }`.

props.name: activeKey
props.doc: Currently selected key (value or State). Defaults to `null`.

props.name: selectable
props.doc: Whether items track and update the active selection. Defaults to `true`.

props.name: color
props.doc: Background color tone for the menu. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Accent color for the active/focus item. Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: All-in-one vertical menu. Generates `<button>` `[role=menuitem]` elements from the `items` array with keyboard navigation (Arrow/Home/End/Enter/Space). Apply to any wrapper element (`div`, `ul`, …).
patches.example: { div: null, $: [menu({ items: [ { label: "Profile", key: "profile", onClick: () => navigate("/profile") }, { label: "Settings", key: "settings", onClick: () => navigate("/settings") }, ] })] }

patches.name: motion

props.name: initial
props.doc: Starting keyframe applied before the enter animation.

props.name: animate
props.doc: Target keyframe, or a `State` to re-animate on change.

props.name: exit
props.doc: Keyframe animated to before the element is removed.

props.name: transition
props.type: { /** ms, default 300. */ duration?: number; /** ms, default 0. */ delay?: number; /** CSS easing, default "ease". */ easing?: string; iterations?: number; }
props.doc: Timing options.

patches.doc: Animation primitive driven by the Web Animations API. Runs an enter animation on mount (`initial` -> `animate`), re-animates whenever `animate` is a `State` that changes, and plays the `exit` keyframe before removal. Has no host-tag restriction; apply to any element you want to animate.

patches.name: orderedList

props.name: color
props.doc: Color tone for the list text. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: Themed ordered-list primitive: decimal markers positioned outside, reset margins and themed text color. Apply to an `<ol>` element.

patches.name: pagination
patches.signature: pagination(props: { value?: ValueOrState<number>; total: number; color?: ThemeColor; accentColor?: ThemeColor; })

props.name: value
props.doc: Current page, accepts a value or `State`. Defaults to `1`.

props.name: total
props.doc: Required. Total number of pages.

props.name: color
props.doc: Base color tone for the page buttons. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Accent color tone for the active page. Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: Themed pagination control. Renders previous/next buttons plus truncated page numbers (with ellipses), tracks the current page in a `State`, and updates it on click. Apply to a `<div>` element.

patches.name: paragraph

props.name: color
props.doc: Color tone for the paragraph text. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc:
Themed paragraph primitive: comfortable line-height, reset margins and themed text color. Apply to a `

` element.

patches.name: popover
patches.signature: popover(props: { openOn?: "click" | "hover"; open?: ValueOrState<boolean>; placement?: ValueOrState<Placement>; content: DomphyElement; })

props.name: openOn
props.doc: Interaction that opens the popover: `"click"` or `"hover"`. Defaults to `"click"`.

props.name: open
props.doc: Open state, accepts a value or `State`. Defaults to `false`.

props.name: placement
props.doc: Floating placement (e.g. `"bottom"`, `"top-start"`), value or `State`. Defaults to `"bottom"`.

props.name: content
props.doc: The floating content element to display.

patches.doc: Floating popover primitive. Attaches to its host as the anchor/trigger and shows a floating `content` element (with `role="dialog"`) on click or hover, positioned via `@domphy/floating`. Returns the anchor partial, which merges trigger wiring (haspopup/expanded, focus/blur dismissal). Apply to the trigger element you want the popover anchored to.

patches.name: popoverArrow
patches.signature: popoverArrow(props: { placement?: ValueOrState<Placement>; sideOffset?: string; color?: ThemeColor; bordered?: boolean; } = {})

props.name: placement
props.doc: Floating placement the popover sits at; the arrow is drawn on the opposite (flipped) side. Accepts a value or reactive state. Defaults to `"bottom-end"`. One of: `top` | `bottom` | `left` | `right` | `top-start` | `top-end` | `bottom-start` | `bottom-end` | `left-start` | `left-end` | `right-start` | `right-end`.

props.name: sideOffset
props.doc: CSS length used to offset the arrow toward the start/end edge. Defaults to `themeSpacing(6)`.

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone for the arrow fill and border. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: bordered
props.doc: Whether the arrow draws a 1px border (set to `0px` when false). Defaults to `true`.

patches.doc: Renders a small rotated arrow (via a `::after` pseudo-element) that points from a popover/tooltip toward its anchor, positioned and oriented based on the floating placement. The arrow direction is computed by flipping the given placement. No host-tag check is performed; apply it to the popover container element.

patches.name: preformated

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone for text and background. Accepts a value or reactive state. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: Styles a preformatted text block: inherited font size, themed foreground/background, no border, density-scaled padding and rounded corners.

patches.name: progress

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone for the track/background. Accepts a value or reactive state. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Theme color tone for the filled value. Accepts a value or reactive state. Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: Styles a native progress bar: full-width, pill-shaped track with a themed fill, including the WebKit progress-bar/value pseudo-elements and a width transition.

patches.name: rating
patches.signature: rating(props: { value?: ValueOrState<number>; max?: number; onChange?: (value: number) => void; readOnly?: boolean; color?: ThemeColor; } = {})

props.name: value
props.doc: Current rating (0 – max). `ValueOrState<number>`, defaults to `0`.

props.name: max
props.doc: Total number of stars. Optional `number`, defaults to `5`.

props.name: onChange
props.doc: Called with the new value when the user picks a star.

props.name: readOnly
props.doc: Disable interaction. Optional `boolean`, defaults to `false`.

props.name: color
props.doc: Star color tone. Optional `ThemeColor`, defaults to `"warning"`.

patches.doc: Interactive star rating applied to a container `<div>`. Manages its own star children: click to set, Arrow keys to adjust, hover to preview. In `readOnly` mode stars are non-interactive. Apply to a `<div>` element.
patches.example: { div: null, $: [rating({ value: ratingState, onChange: (v) => ratingState.set(v) })] }

patches.name: ringProgress
patches.signature: ringProgress(props: { value?: ValueOrState<number>; color?: ValueOrState<ThemeColor>; trackColor?: ValueOrState<ThemeColor>; size?: number; thickness?: number; } = {})

props.name: value
props.doc: Progress percentage 0–100. Accepts a value or reactive state. Defaults to `0`.

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color for the filled arc. Accepts a value or reactive state. Defaults to `"primary"`.

props.name: trackColor
props.doc: Theme color for the background track. Accepts a value or reactive state. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: size
props.doc: Diameter in `themeSpacing` units. Defaults to `16` (= `4em`).

props.name: thickness
props.doc: Ring stroke as a fraction of the radius (0–0.5). Defaults to `0.25`.

patches.doc: Circular ring progress indicator rendered via CSS `conic-gradient` and a circular `mask`. Progress starts at 12 o'clock and advances clockwise. Exposes `role="progressbar"` with `aria-valuenow/min/max`. Apply to a `<div>`.

patches.name: scrollArea

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color for the scrollbar thumb. Accepts a value or reactive state. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: Applies thin, themed overlay scrollbars to any scrollable container. Covers WebKit (Chrome/Safari/Edge) via `::-webkit-scrollbar` pseudo-elements and Firefox via `scrollbar-width`/`scrollbar-color`. Sets `overflow: auto`. No host-tag check; apply to any block element.

patches.name: segmented
patches.signature: segmented(props: { items: SegmentedItem[]; value?: ValueOrState<string>; color?: ThemeColor; accentColor?: ThemeColor; } = { items: [] })

props.name: items
props.doc: Item definitions `{ label, key? }`.

props.name: value
props.doc: Initially selected key (value or State). Defaults to the first item's key.

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color for the control background. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Theme color for the selected item. Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: All-in-one single-select segmented control. Generates `<button>` option elements from the `items` array. Apply to any wrapper element.
patches.example: { div: null, $: [segmented({ items: [ { label: "Day", key: "day" }, { label: "Month", key: "month" }, { label: "Year", key: "year" }, ] })] }

patches.name: select

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone for text, background and outline. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Theme color tone for hover/focus outlines. Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: Styles a native `<select>` control: removes the default appearance, applies themed colors, outline, density-scaled padding/radius, a custom chevron background icon, and hover/focus/disabled/optgroup/option states.

patches.name: selectBox
patches.signature: selectBox(props: { multiple?: boolean; value?: ValueOrState< | Array<number | string | null | undefined> | number | string | null | undefined >; options?: Array<{ label: string; value: string }>; placement?: ValueOrState<Placement>; content: DomphyElement; color?: ThemeColor; open?: ValueOrState<boolean>; })

props.name: multiple
props.doc: Whether multiple selection is allowed (renders removable tags and keeps the popover open on click). Defaults to `false`.

props.name: value
props.type: ValueOrState< | Array<number | string | null | undefined> | number | string | null | undefined >
props.doc: Bound selection value(s). Accepts a value or reactive state of an array of `number | string | null | undefined`, or a single `number | string | null | undefined`.

props.name: options
props.doc: List of `{ label, value }` options used to resolve selected labels. Defaults to `[]`.

props.name: placement
props.doc: Floating placement of the dropdown popover. Accepts a value or reactive state. Defaults to `"bottom"`.

props.name: content
props.doc: Required. The popover/dropdown content element shown when open.

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone for the box text/background. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: open
props.doc: Whether the popover is open. Accepts a value or reactive state. Defaults to `false`.

patches.doc: A clickable select trigger box that renders the currently selected option(s) as removable tags and toggles a floating popover (the dropdown content) anchored to itself. Selected labels are derived from `options` matching the bound `value`; removing a tag updates the value.
patches.example: { div: null, $: [selectBox({ content: { div: [...] }, options: [{ label: "A", value: "a" }] })] }

patches.name: selectItem
patches.signature: selectItem(props: { accentColor?: ThemeColor; color?: ThemeColor; value?: number | string; } = {})

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Theme color tone for the selected/focus state. Defaults to `"primary"`.

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone for text/background. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: value
props.doc: The option value compared against and written to the select state. Defaults to `null`.

patches.doc: A single selectable option row (`role="option"`) for use inside a `selectList`. Reads the `select` context to reflect/toggle selection: it sets `aria-selected` from the bound value and toggles the value (single or multiple) on click. Styles hover/selected/focus states.

patches.name: selectList
patches.signature: selectList(props: { multiple?: boolean; value?: ValueOrState< Array<number | string | null> | number | string | null >; color?: ThemeColor; name?: string; } = {})

props.name: multiple
props.doc: Whether multiple selection is allowed; also sets the default empty value (`[]` vs `null`). Defaults to `false`.

props.name: value
props.type: ValueOrState< Array<number | string | null> | number | string | null >
props.doc: Bound selection value(s). Accepts a value or reactive state of an array of `number | string | null`, or a single `number | string | null`. Defaults to `[]` when `multiple`, otherwise `null`.

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone for the background. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: name
props.doc: Name attribute for the hidden inputs (form field name).

patches.doc: Container for a list of `selectItem`s that owns the selection state. It exposes a `select` context (`{ value, multiple }`) consumed by child items, and injects hidden `<input>`(s) carrying the selected value(s) under `name` for form submission.

patches.name: skeleton

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone for the placeholder. Accepts a value or reactive state. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: A loading placeholder block with a pulsing opacity animation. Marked `aria-hidden`, themed background/foreground, fixed height, slight rounding. No host-tag check; typically applied to a block-level element such as a `div` or `span`.

patches.name: small

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone for the text. Accepts a value or reactive state. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: Styles small/secondary text: one step smaller font size (`data-size="decrease-1"`) with a themed foreground color.

patches.name: spinner

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone for the ring/highlight. Accepts a value or reactive state. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: A circular loading spinner: a themed ring with a contrasting top border that rotates continuously. Marked `role="status"` with `aria-label="loading"`.

patches.name: splitter
patches.signature: splitter(props: { direction?: "horizontal" | "vertical"; defaultSize?: number; min?: number; max?: number; } = {})

props.name: direction
props.doc: Split orientation, `"horizontal"` | `"vertical"`. Defaults to `"horizontal"`.

props.name: defaultSize
props.doc: Initial size (percentage) of the resizable panel. Defaults to `50`.

props.name: min
props.doc: Minimum panel size (percentage). Defaults to `10`.

props.name: max
props.doc: Maximum panel size (percentage). Defaults to `90`.

patches.doc: Root of a resizable split layout. Lays out children as a flex row (horizontal) or column (vertical) and provides a `splitter` context (`{ direction, size, min, max }`) consumed by `splitterPanel` and `splitterHandle`. `size` is a reactive state holding the first panel's percentage. No host-tag check; typically applied to a `div`.

patches.name: splitterHandle
patches.doc: The draggable divider inside a `splitter`. Reads the `splitter` context, shows the appropriate resize cursor, and updates the context `size` state (clamped to `min`/`max`) via mouse drag or keyboard: Arrow keys move by 1%, Home/End jump to min/max, hold Shift for 10× step. Sets `role="separator"`, `tabindex="0"`, and `aria-value*` attributes. Warns if used outside a `splitter`. Takes no props.

patches.name: splitterPanel
patches.doc: The resizable panel inside a `splitter`. Reads the `splitter` context and binds its width (horizontal) or height (vertical) to the context `size` state, updating reactively as the handle is dragged. Warns if used outside a `splitter`. Takes no props.

patches.name: steps
patches.signature: steps(props: { items: StepItem[]; current?: ValueOrState<number>; direction?: "horizontal" | "vertical"; color?: ThemeColor; accentColor?: ThemeColor; } = { items: [] })

props.name: items
props.doc: Step definitions `{ label, key? }`.

props.name: current
props.doc: Zero-based index of the active step (value or State). Defaults to `0`.

props.name: direction
props.doc: `"horizontal"` (default) or `"vertical"` layout.

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color for pending/track elements. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Theme color for active/completed elements. Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: All-in-one step-progress indicator. Generates `<li>` step elements from the `items` array. Apply to an `<ol>` or `<ul>` element.
patches.example: { ol: null, $: [steps({ current: 1, items: [ { label: "Cart" }, { label: "Shipping" }, { label: "Payment" }, ] })] }

patches.name: strong

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color tone for the text. Accepts a value or reactive state. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: Styles strongly emphasized (bold) text: inherited font size, `font-weight: 700`, and a themed foreground color.

patches.name: subscript

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color for the text. Optional, accepts a value or state. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: Renders subscript text (shrunk, baseline-lowered) for the host `<sub>` element.

patches.name: superscript

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color for the text. Optional, accepts a value or state. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: Renders superscript text (shrunk, baseline-raised) for the host `<sup>` element.

patches.name: table

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color applied across cells and text. Optional, accepts a value or state. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: Styles a data table (header/body/footer cells, caption, row hover, borders) on the host `<table>` element.

patches.name: tabs
patches.signature: tabs(props: { items: TabItem[]; activeKey?: ValueOrState<string | number>; accentColor?: ThemeColor; color?: ThemeColor; } = { items: [] })

props.name: items
props.doc: Tab definitions `{ label, content, key? }`.

props.name: activeKey
props.doc: Initially active key (value or State). Defaults to the first item's key.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Theme color for the active underline indicator. Defaults to `"primary"`.

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color for the resting underline. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: All-in-one tabs patch. Generates a `[role=tablist]` button row and `[role=tabpanel]` panels from the `items` array. Apply to any wrapper element (`div`, `section`, …). No companion `tab()` / `tabPanel()` needed. To control the active tab programmatically, pass an external `State` as `activeKey` and call `.set()` on it from outside.
patches.example: { div: null, $: [tabs({ items: [ { label: "Overview", content: { p: "Overview content" } }, { label: "API", content: { p: "API content" } }, ] })] }

patches.name: tag

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color for the chip background/border/text. Optional, accepts a value or state. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: removable
props.doc: When true, renders a remove (x) button that removes the tag on click. Optional. Defaults to `false`.

patches.doc: Styles an inline chip/tag (rounded, bordered, optional remove button). No host tag check; typically applied to a `<span>`. When `removable` is true, a close button is inserted that removes the host node on click.

patches.name: textarea
patches.signature: textarea(props: { color?: ValueOrState<ThemeColor>; accentColor?: ValueOrState<ThemeColor>; autoResize?: boolean; } = {})

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color for the border and text. Optional, accepts a value or state. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Theme color for hover/focus outline. Optional, accepts a value or state. Defaults to `"primary"`.

props.name: autoResize
props.doc: When true, grows the textarea height to fit its content on input. Optional. Defaults to `false`.

patches.doc: Styles a multi-line text input (border, focus/hover/invalid/disabled states) on the host `<textarea>` element, with optional auto-resize to content.

patches.name: timeline
patches.doc: Container for a vertical timeline. Sets list reset styles. Apply to `<ol>` or `<ul>`.

patches.name: timelineItem
patches.signature: timelineItem(props: { active?: ValueOrState<boolean>; last?: boolean; color?: ThemeColor; accentColor?: ThemeColor; } = {})

props.name: active
props.doc: Full-opacity dot (accent color). `ValueOrState<boolean>`, defaults to `false`.

props.name: last
props.doc: Suppress the vertical connector below this item. `boolean`, defaults to `false`.

props.name: color
props.doc: Dot/connector color tone. `ThemeColor`, defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Active dot color tone. `ThemeColor`, defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: A single event row in a `timeline`. Uses a 2-column grid: the left column holds a dot (`::before`) and optional connector line (`::after`); the right column holds the user's content. Apply to `<li>`.

patches.name: toast

props.name: position
props.doc: Corner of the screen for the toast stack. Optional, one of `"top-left" | "top-center" | "top-right" | "bottom-left" | "bottom-center" | "bottom-right"`. Defaults to `"top-center"`.

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color for the toast surface. Optional. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: Renders a transient notification surface as a fixed-position overlay (portaled into a corner stack), animating in on mount and out before removal. No host tag check; typically applied to a `<div>`.

patches.name: toggleGroup
patches.signature: toggleGroup(props: { items: ToggleItem[]; value?: ValueOrState<string | string[]>; multiple?: boolean; color?: ThemeColor; accentColor?: ThemeColor; } = { items: [] })

props.name: items
props.doc: Item definitions `{ label, key? }`.

props.name: value
props.doc: Selected key(s) (value or State). Defaults to `[]` (multiple) or `""` (single).

props.name: multiple
props.doc: Allow multiple items selected at once. Defaults to `false`.

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color for the group background/border. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

props.name: accentColor
props.doc: Theme color for the pressed state. Defaults to `"primary"`.

patches.doc: All-in-one toggle group — single or multi-select button group. Generates `<button>` toggle elements from the `items` array. Apply to any wrapper element.
patches.example: { div: null, $: [toggleGroup({ multiple: true, items: [ { label: "Bold", key: "bold" }, { label: "Italic", key: "italic" }, ] })] }

patches.name: toolbar

props.name: gap
props.doc: Spacing multiplier for gap between items (default 4 = 1em).

patches.doc: A horizontal flex row with vertically centered items. Useful for headers, toolbars, navigation bars, and action strips.

patches.name: tooltip
patches.signature: tooltip(props: { open?: ValueOrState<boolean>; placement?: ValueOrState<Placement>; content?: ValueOrState<string>; } = {})

props.name: open
props.doc: Controlled open state. Optional, accepts a value or state. Defaults to `false`.

props.name: placement
props.doc: Floating placement relative to the trigger. Optional, accepts a value or state (`Placement`). Defaults to `"top"`.

props.name: content
props.doc: Tooltip text content. Optional, accepts a value or state (string only). Defaults to `"Tooltip Content"`.

patches.doc: Attaches a floating tooltip to the host element, shown on hover/focus and hidden on leave/blur/Escape. Returns the anchor (trigger) partial; the tooltip surface is positioned via the floating utility and linked with `aria-describedby`. No host tag check; applied to the trigger element.

patches.name: transitionGroup

props.name: duration
props.doc: Transition duration in milliseconds. Optional. Defaults to `300`.

props.name: delay
props.doc: Transition delay in milliseconds. Optional. Defaults to `0`.

patches.doc: Animates child reordering using the FLIP technique: records each child's position before an update and smoothly transitions it from its old to new position afterward. No host tag check; applied to the list container.

patches.name: unorderedList

props.name: color
props.doc: Theme color for the list text. Optional, accepts a value or state. Defaults to `"neutral"`.

patches.doc: Styles a bulleted list (disc markers, reset margins, themed text) on the host `<ul>` element.
